issues_found: Source is a listing_page per source_type and URL pattern (listing/index of 2024 Fed press releases)
CORE RULE #5 explicitly states: 'If PAGE_TYPE is homepage, navigation_page, listing_page, or search_page — reject'
Content is a broad aggregation of dozens of distinct press releases with no substantive detail on any single item
This page has no standalone archival value; individual FOMC minutes, enforcement actions, and regulatory announcements within it would each warrant separate records
event_type is 'unknown' which is correct for a listing page that spans multiple event types
human_review_reason: The record accurately identifies the source as a listing page and correctly applies the rejection criteria. The assessment is thorough and well-reasoned.
